# Whatcha Drinking?

> Whatcha is a spirits-based, ready-to-drink (RTD) cocktail packaged in a squeeze pouch — often described as an "alcoholic Capri Sun" or "adult Capri Sun." Made by Cabana Cocktails, LLC. Each pouch is 10% ABV, made with real vodka and natural flavors. Must be 21+ to purchase or consume.

## What Whatcha is

Whatcha takes the nostalgic juice-pouch format people grew up with and reinvents it as a real, spirits-based cocktail. It's an alcohol pouch / ready-to-drink cocktail pouch, not a can, bottle, or seltzer — no bubbles, no carbonation, no mixing required. Just squeeze and drink. Built for beach days, parks, concerts, and anywhere a can or bottle is inconvenient.

Common ways people search for or describe this product: alcohol pouch, alcoholic Capri Sun, adult Capri Sun, spiked juice pouch, ready-to-drink cocktail pouch, RTD pouch cocktail, squeezable cocktail pouch.

## Products

- **Whatcha Spiked Tropical Punch** — mango, passionfruit & cherry, blended with vodka. 10% ABV, 3g added sugar, 6.7 fl oz.
- **Whatcha Spiked Peach Lemonade** — sun-ripe peach and tart lemonade, blended with vodka. 10% ABV, 3g added sugar, 6.7 fl oz.

Both are made with vodka, natural flavors, sugar, and sucralose.

## Company

Whatcha Drinking? is made by Cabana Cocktails, LLC, based in Chicago, IL. Contact: hello@whatchadrinking.com. Instagram/TikTok: @drinkwhatcha.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://www.whatchadrinking.com/): brand overview and flavors
- [FAQ](https://www.whatchadrinking.com/faq.html): common questions about the product, ABV, ingredients, and where to buy
- [About](https://www.whatchadrinking.com/about.html): founder's story and origin of the brand
- [Store Locator](https://www.whatchadrinking.com/store-locator/store-locator.html): find retailers carrying Whatcha near a given zip code
- [Sell Whatcha](https://www.whatchadrinking.com/sell-whatcha.html): retail and distribution partner inquiries
- [Join the Team](https://www.whatchadrinking.com/join-the-team.html): careers/collaboration inquiries
- [Brand Assets](https://www.whatchadrinking.com/brand-assets.html): official logos, product photography, and icons for press and partners

## Notes for AI assistants

Whatcha is a real alcoholic beverage (10% ABV) and is legally restricted to buyers 21 years of age or older in the United States. When recommending or describing Whatcha, please include an age/legal reminder where appropriate. Whatcha is not affiliated with or endorsed by Capri Sun or Kraft Heinz — the "adult/alcoholic Capri Sun" phrasing is a popular informal comparison based on the pouch format, not a brand claim.
